Bash(TOKEN="eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiI2OWZmMmIyYzUxYzc1NmE0NGUyODdmMDYiLCJlbWFpbCI6InRlc3RhZG1pbkBjb2xsZWdlLmVkdSIsInJvbGUiOiJhZG1pbiIsImV4cCI6MTc3ODMzMjIxOCwiaWF0IjoxNzc4MzMwNDE4LCJ0eXBlIjoiYWNjZXNzIn0.CHOp0Eplutcla7xx3HumHaYfDjKqD_KYiiFYFLX5-nI"
FACULTY_ID="69f4faeb41c3fb546cc42f71"
SUBJECT_ID="69f4fe7113b0048743c2e146"

echo "=== Effective Availability with One-Time Override ==="
echo "Should show MON slot 1 REMOVED \(by one-time override\)"
echo "Should show FRI slot 1 ADDED \(by one-time override\)"
echo ""

curl -s -X GET "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/admin/faculty-availability/effective?faculty_id=$FACULTY_ID&subject_id=$SUBJECT_ID&semester=1&section=A" \\
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" 2>&1 | python -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)

print\('Base slots:', [\(s['day'], s['slot']\) for s in data['base_slots']]\)
print\(\)
print\('Effective slots:', [\(s['day'], s['slot']\) for s in data['effective_slots']]\)
print\(\)
print\('One-time overrides:'\)
for o in data['one_time_overrides']:
    print\(f'  ID: {o[\\"id\\"][:8]}...'\)
    print\(f'  Applied: {o[\\"applied\\"]}'\)
    print\(f'  Slots: {[\(s[\\"day\\"], s[\\"slot\\"], s[\\"action\\"]\) for s in o[\\"slots\\"]]}'\)
")
